headline: Who owns Amazon? Top executives and institutional investors
summary: Amazon is the biggest online retailer in the world, and its market capitalization of $2.9 trillion makes it the fifth-largest company. Its spectacular stock price gain since its IPO has made founder Jeff Bezos a billionaire many times over and minted millionaires among early investors who held onto ...

headline: Crypto Bulls Have A New Catalyst: It's Not Bitcoin's Price—It's Washington
